overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a survival horror game depicting a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-shrouded suburban neighborhood with dilapidated wooden houses. The character walks along cracked sidewalks and empty streets through heavy mist, creating a tense, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential sidewalk with clapboard houses

events.description: Maria exits the frame to the right, leaving James walking alone
turning left to follow the sidewalk path alongside the house

agents.ego_description: walking with Maria initially, then proceeding alone past a weathered two-story house with a wooden porch

notable_agents.action: Maria stands beside James initially, then remains behind as he walks forward into the fog

entered.detail: weathered gray clapboard house with dark shutters and a covered front porch
tall wooden pole with multiple power lines extending across the scene
white wooden fence bordering the house property with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with two characters standing in heavy fog near a weathered two-story house. As the woman exits the frame, the man continues walking forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing a wooden utility pole and white picket fence while turning left to follow the path alongside the house.

events.description: approaching a diamond-shaped street sign and green trash bins at the curb
turning right to cross the foggy residential street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past utility poles and mailboxes, then crossing the empty street toward the opposite side

entered.detail: red diamond-shaped warning sign mounted on a metal pole at the street corner
dark colored mailbox on a wooden post near the sidewalk edge
large green wheeled garbage bin positioned at the curb
dark sedan parked on the foggy street partially obscured by mist

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy residential sidewalk, the character passes a mailbox and wooden utility pole before approaching a street corner marked by a diamond-shaped sign and green trash bins. The character then turns right to cross the empty asphalt street, leaving the initial house behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between dilapidated wooden houses

events.description: entering a narrow alley between two fog-shrouded houses
turning left to approach the porch of a gabled wooden house

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between dilapidated houses and approaching a porch with wooden stairs

entered.detail: weathered two-story house with a gabled roof, overgrown vines, and peeling paint
similar aged wooden house with a front porch and lattice skirting on the right side
wooden stairs with white railings leading up to a covered porch entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, fog-filled passage between two dilapidated wooden houses with overgrown yards. Turning left, the character approaches the porch of a gabled house, walking up to the wooden stairs while the heavy mist obscures the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a heavy mist that leads from an open residential street into a claustrophobic passage between decaying homes. It begins with two characters standing near a weathered two-story house, but as the woman exits the frame, the man continues forward along a concrete sidewalk past a white picket fence. The camera then follows him as he passes a mailbox and utility pole toward a street corner marked by green trash bins, before turning right to cross an empty asphalt street. This movement shifts the perspective into a narrow, fog-filled gap between dilapidated wooden houses with overgrown yards. Finally, the character turns left and approaches the wooden stairs of a gabled porch as the dense mist completely obscures the surrounding neighborhood.
